data.title: Singapore's MetaComp Raises Pre-A+ Round Backed By Alibaba, Closing Total US$35 Million Pre-A Funding in 3 months to Accelerate Asia's Regulated Web2.5 Pay and Wealth1 Group-Level Platform
data.description: In Singapore on March 12, 2026, MetaComp Pte. Ltd revealed the successful conclusion of its Pre-A+ funding round, alongside licensed affiliates, amassing a total of US$35 million. MetaComp is recognized as a leading figure in unified Web2.5 payments and wealth group-level services in Asia.

data.title: Anthropic invests $100M in Claude Partner Network to drive enterprise AI via Accenture and Deloitte.
data.description: Anthropic has recently introduced the Claude Partner Network along with a substantial investment of $100 million. This initiative aims to enhance enterprise adoption by collaborating with leading consultancies such as Accenture and Deloitte.

data.title: Malaga Financial Corporation Announces 87th Consecutive Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Malaga Financial Corporation (OTCPink:MLGF) based in Palos Verdes Estates, California, declared a cash dividend of 25 cents per share on March 12, 2026. Shareholders as of March 25, 2026, will receive the dividend around April 1, 2026. Randy C. Bowers, the Chairman, President, and CEO, highlighted the significance of this 25-cent quarterly dividend, equating to a 4.59% annualized yield based on the recent $21.80 closing price. The company credited its team for enabling the declaration of the 87th consecutive quarterly cash dividend, showing appreciation for shareholders' loyalty.
